A distant metallic groan echoes through the hull.
Emergency lights flicker in the corridor.
You hear a faint hiss of escaping air somewhere aft.
A soft thump reverberates through the deck plates.
The ventilation hums with an irregular rhythm.
A faint chemical tang lingers in the air.
You catch a glimpse of something moving in the shadows.
The ship's intercom crackles with static.
A sudden jolt shakes the ship, throwing you off balance.
The lights dim momentarily, then return to normal.
You feel a cold draft coming from the airlock.
The ship's systems emit a low, ominous hum.
You see a flicker of movement out of the corner of your eye.
The sound of dripping water echoes in the distance.
A faint, eerie melody seems to be playing somewhere on the ship.
The ship's AI emits a distorted, garbled message.
You feel a sudden drop in temperature.
You hear a faint whispering sound, but can't make out any words.
The ship's emergency siren blares briefly, then falls silent.
You see a shadowy figure standing at the end of the corridor, but when you look again, it's gone.
You swear that the escape pod was right there a moment ago, but now it's missing.
The ship's systems report an unidentified anomaly nearby.
You feel a strange sensation, as if something is watching you.
The ship's lights flicker and dim, plunging you into darkness for a moment
